note: 1막 적 전용 마스터(현재 scout 텍스처 공유 중). gen_images.py로 생성 → assets/review/act1-enemy-masters-v1/{id}-v1.png. QA(전신·경계 비접촉·평면크로마·무텍스트) → 승인 → assets/masters/{id}/ → 키포즈 보드 → texture 교체.
negativePrompt: glossy 3D render, smooth mobile render, front-facing pose, cropped limbs or weapon, multiple creatures, humanoid player character, text, logo, watermark, color fringe, recognizable franchise unit copy, #00ff00 on the subject
globalStyle: Original ENEMY battle sprite for SLAY THE MONSTARZ (Slay-the-Spire-style dark-fantasy roguelike). Hand-painted dark-fantasy 2D, thick dark outlines, gritty painterly texture, muted palette with luminous faction accents; menacing, readable silhouette at small combat size. Match the painted tone of existing enemies sentinel_scout / brood_queen.
globalConstraints: STRICT SIDE VIEW facing LEFT (toward the player on the left). Full body, centered, generous safe padding, nothing touching the edge. Flat uniform solid #00ff00 chroma background (no gradient/shadow/floor). Mid-tier normal-enemy scale (elite slightly larger), clearly smaller than a boss. No text, no logo, no watermark.

assets.prompt: The Wasteland Gunner, a scrappy Terran-style ranged raider: patched riveted armor, a bulky twin-barrel autogun, a bandolier of shells, a battered helmet with a glowing visor slit, hunched aggressive firing stance. Charcoal and rust with one ember-orange muzzle accent.

The Acid Stalker, a lean Zerg-style ambush predator: low serpentine body on clawed legs, segmented chitin, dripping acid maw, back-mounted spine launchers, a single baleful eye, tense crouched stalking pose. Purple-black chitin with acid-yellow drip and magenta accents.

The Elite Sentinel, a heavier decorated Protoss-style war-sentinel: a larger hovering unit with reinforced symmetrical relic plating, dual energy lances, multiple orbiting shield shards, a bright central sensor eye. Clearly more elite and imposing than a basic floating scout but below boss scale. Tarnished gold-and-obsidian relic texture with teal/cyan energy.
